channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: China bars Manus co-founders from leaving country amid Meta deal review: FT
item.description: [Business Times] The case highlights Beijing’s broader concerns about the loss of valuable technology to a geopolitical rival

item.title: New partnerships, facilities by JTC to bolster startups at LaunchPad @ one-north
item.description: [Business Times] This includes a new co-working and event space for networking, investor meetings and community events

item.title: Oracle begins cutting thousands of jobs as tech giant ramps up AI spending, CNBC reports
item.description: [Straits Times] More than 70 tech companies have cut around 40,480 jobs so far in 2026.

item.title: 【钛晨报】央行：要继续实施适度宽松的货币政策，加大逆周期和跨周期调节力度；国行版苹果AI突然上线后又被撤回，苹果回应：正在积极推进落地中国；360智能体发现OpenClaw高危漏洞，或波及全球17万实例
item.description: [钛媒体] Kimi K2.5发布一个月后，月之暗面ARR突破1亿美金；支付宝发布国内首个“支付集成Skill”；华为2025年营收8809亿，研发投入1923亿；抖音“未来导演扶持计划”发布阶段性成果；美国太空探索技术公司一颗“星链”卫星失联；工信部等九部门：到2028年，物联网核心产业规模突破3.5万亿元；两部门：推动人工智能、脑机接口等与医疗装备融合创新，培育新的增长点；提高准入门槛，强制性产品认证管理办法征求意见；央行：2月同业拆借日均成交4293.2亿元，同比增加87.1%；沃伦·巴菲特：股票市场估值仍然缺乏吸引力；3月中国制造业采购经理指数为50.4%，经济回升向好；财政部：1-2月国有企业营

item.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Slack just got a whole lot more useful.

item.title: Anthropic to sign deal with Australia on AI safety and economic data tracking
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Claude Code leak exposes a Tamagotchi-style ‘pet’ and an always-on agent
item.description: [The Verge AI] After Anthropic released Claude Code's 2.1.88 update, users quickly discovered that it contained a package with a source map file containing its TypeScript codebase, with one person on X calling attention to the leak and posting a file containing the code. The leaked data reportedly contains more th

item.title: Tech giant Oracle makes 'significant' job cuts
item.description: [BBC Technology] It is thought that thousands of people may have lost their jobs at Oracle, one of the world's largest tech companies.

item.title: OpenAI valued at $1 trillion after record $157 billion funding round
item.description: [Straits Times] The bulk of the financing came from three large tech companies – Amazon, Nvidia and SoftBank Group.

item.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

item.title: You can now use ChatGPT with Apple’s CarPlay
item.description: [The Verge AI] ChatGPT is now accessible from your CarPlay dashboard if you have iOS 26.4 or newer and the latest version of the ChatGPT app, 9to5Mac reports. Apple's recently launched iOS 26.4 update added support for "voice-based conversational apps" in CarPlay, opening the door to let you use AI chatbots with v

item.title: North Korea-linked hack hits largely invisible software that powers online services
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.

item.title: The Galaxy S26’s photo app can sloppify your memories
item.description: [The Verge AI] The Google Pixel 9 walked so that the Samsung Galaxy S26 could run. Google introduced AI editing tools to Photos slowly. It started with changes to the background - make the sky more blue, or remove crowds of tourists. Things got weird once the company added natural language requests and let you ask

item.title: Alexa+ gets new food ordering experiences with Uber Eats and Grubhub
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] You can now order from Uber Eats and Grubhub using Alexa+, an experience Amazon says will be similar to chatting with a waiter at a restaurant or placing an order at a drive-thru.

item.title: Twelve Cupcakes workers to receive half of owed salary; MOM issues stern warning against employer
item.description: [Straits Times] The liquidator has contacted the workers so that their salaries and overtime pay can be paid.

item.title: Apple tests Siri feature that handles multiple commands at once, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: KKR plans to privatise Japan's Taiyo Holdings with $3.3 billion tender offer
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Nomadic raises $8.4 million to wrangle the data pouring off autonomous vehicles
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The company turns footage from robots into structured, searchable datasets with a deep learning model.

item.title: Art schools are being torn apart by AI
item.description: [The Verge AI] When my baby brother, a 3D modelling and animation student, talks to me about his projects and studies, the pride I usually feel is becoming increasingly tainted by a growing sense of dread. As a creative professional and former design student myself, I understand all too well how fierce the competi

item.title: Tech giant Sea to donate S$50m to boost football development in Singapore
item.description: [CNA Tech] Sea, which runs e-commerce platform Shopee, said it will work closely with the government and the football community to deploy the funds effectively.

item.title: Exclusive: Runway launches $10M fund, Builders program to support early-stage AI startups
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Runway is launching a $10 million fund and startup program to back companies building with its AI video models, as it pushes toward interactive, real-time “video intelligence” applications.

item.title: 量化派2025业绩出炉：经营质效双升“AI+消费”，战略开启增长新局面
item.description: [钛媒体] 量化派正式发布2025年度业绩报告，交出上市后首份“成绩单”。

item.title: 四家机器人厂商，一起投了一家数据公司丨涌现新项目
item.description: [36氪] 文｜邱晓芬 编辑｜苏建勋 一句话介绍 「智域基石」是一家致力于构建具身智能时代数据入口与训练输入基础设施的公司，其核心使命是将海量、杂乱的原始物理世界数据，精准编译成直接面向机器人任务成功率的高质量训练输入。 团队介绍 「智域基石」CEO杨哲轩为前PingCAP核心成员，拥有大规模分布式系统与底层架构设计的背景，也是连续创业者，负责多家公司商业化业务。 「智域基石」CTO徐良威有着腾讯、小鹏机器人的从业背景，是实战经验丰富的机器人软硬件专家，熟悉具身智能算法对于数据的需求，也有丰富硬件落地的经验。 「智域基石」COO为张计业，前华为地市总经理，曾担任具身智能公司「穹

item.title: You can order Grubhub and Uber Eats ‘conversationally’ with Alexa Plus
item.description: [The Verge AI] Amazon is giving you a new way to order food through Grubhub and Uber Eats with Alexa without having to endure an awkward exchange just to add fries. Amazon said the entire process is meant to be conversational, building your order in a similar manner to ordering in a restaurant. That means changing

item.title: AI Has Flooded All the Weather Apps
item.description: [WIRED AI] Weather forecasting has gotten a big boost from machine learning. How that translates into what users see can vary.

item.title: Building an AI competitive edge through strategy and governance
item.description: [MarTech] AI can produce content at scale, but not direction. Better inputs, proprietary data and clear guardrails drive stronger outcomes. The post Building an AI competitive edge through strategy and governance appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Microsoft plans over US$1 billion cloud, AI investment in Thailand
item.description: [CNA Tech] "Our ambition is for Thailand to grow as a regional driving force in Asia's digital and AI economy," Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul said.

item.title: Singapore shares fall 0.2% following latest Trump threats against Iran
item.description: [Straits Times] The benchmark Straits Times Index lost 11.81 points to finish at 4,885.45.

item.title: 100亿现金也买不来安全感：月之暗面的“PlanB”
item.description: [钛媒体] AI大模型2.0时代，不上市就被“清场”。

item.title: 拿下B站AI创作大赛百万大奖的《牌子》导演，预测今年底是AI奇点
item.description: [钛媒体] 郭帆导演惊呼“超喜欢！”

item.title: 目前市场上最先进的AI大模型，已经集体变成溜须拍马的“舔狗”
item.description: [钛媒体] AI越奉承，人类就越喜欢；人类越喜欢，AI就越奉承。

item.title: 在硅谷，不懂中文还搞什么AI？
item.description: [钛媒体] 华人工程师正在用中文统治AI。

item.title: 碧桂园：连亏三年终盈利
item.description: [36氪] 3月30日晚间，碧桂园集团发布2025年度业绩报告。 报告期内，碧桂园实现总收入约1548.9亿元，同比减少约38.7%，已连续四年下降；权益合同销售金额约330.1亿元，权益销售面积约402万平方米。 公司业务收入主要来房地产开发和科技建造。其中，占比高达97.2%的房地产开发业务，在2025年收入约1504.9亿元，下降38.8%%。 剩下的2.8%来自科技建造及其他分部。2025年，因房地产市场下行导致新增业务量减少，科技建造收入同比下降45.8%至18.6亿元；物业投资及酒店经营等其他业务，收入约25.43亿元，同比降幅约为29.5%。 虽然营收在不断下滑，但碧桂园在利

item.title: 氪星晚报｜B站官宣将下线猜你喜欢算法；北京前沿脑机接口研究院正式成立；​国行版苹果AI突然上线后又被撤回，苹果回应：正在积极推进落地中国
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 韩国摄像头公司从供货iPhone向人形机器人拓展 韩国LG Innotek计划加速转型，减少对iPhone销售的依赖，成为AI和机器人解决方案的领先提供商；该公司已开始向波士顿动力供应摄像头模块，并计划共同开发机器人组件。视觉系统是人形机器人中的重要感知部分，除了特斯拉之外，其他公司都采用了多传感器融合的模式。 B站官宣将下线猜你喜欢算法 36氪获悉，哔哩哔哩宣布：从明天零点起，B站将下线猜你喜欢算法，不再根据你的喜好来推荐主页内容，并上线推荐新算法。 国行版苹果AI突然上线后又被撤回，苹果回应：正在积极推进落地中国 3月31日，国行iPhone设置页面短暂出

item.title: 营收三年增16倍，壁仞科技迎来业绩兑现期
item.description: [36氪] 3月30日港股盘后，壁仞科技发布上市后的首份财务报告。 数据显示，2025年，公司实现营业收入10.35亿元，同比增长207.2%；同期毛利达5.57亿元，同比增长210.8%，对应毛利率为53.8%。 2025年以来，模型的持续迭代、智能体的全面爆发叠加上地缘政治冲突的升温，共同驱动国产算力行业进入快速爆发期。而芯片作为核心基座，受益于行业爆发红利，实现了从技术突破到规模化落地的关键拐点。 作为国产算力芯片的头部企业，壁仞科技此次发布的财报，不仅是公司业绩的观察窗口，更成为国产算力芯片发展趋势与商业化成色的“风向标”。 那么，站在当下，国产算力芯片行业究竟行至何处？透过财报，

item.title: 将AI戒指为入口，追觅瞄准万亿智能可穿戴市场｜最前线
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 王欣逸 编辑 | 邓咏仪 火热的可穿戴智能硬件市场，崛起了一位野心勃勃的争夺者。 3月27日，追觅科技AI智能硬件新品招商会在苏州举办，新品智能戒指Glow成为了会上的焦点产品。 在AI硬件赛道，追觅最先从智能戒指开始布局。 追觅曾于2025年10月发布旗下首个AI硬件产品震动AI智能戒指。这一硬件上市至今累计订单破亿，并登上2026年CES大会，斩获最佳智能穿戴奖。 随后，在今年的3月14日AWE大会上，追觅发布了新一代智能硬件产品AI戒指Glow。 Glow官方定价1799元，首发价为1499元，相较于去年11月发布的定价2699元的震动戒指，Glow

item.title: Malaysia raises 2026 growth outlook, sees Iran war impact contained
item.description: [Straits Times] Bank Negara Malaysia sees the economy expanding between 4 per cent and 5 per cent in 2026.

item.title: 36氪首发 | 磷酸锰铁锂正极材料厂商再获数亿元融资，加码动力电池产能布局
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 乔钰杰 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，近日，江苏珩创纳米科技有限公司（以下简称“珩创纳米”）正式宣布完成B轮融资的数亿元交割。本轮融资由银川育成凤凰科创基金投资，大桉资本担任本轮融资财务顾问。资金将主要用于公司在宁夏银川的产能布局，规划建设年产13万吨（一期3万吨）磷酸锰铁锂（LMFP）正极材料生产线。与此同时，公司在盐城的基地将进一步扩产。 珩创纳米成立于2022年，聚焦新能源电池核心材料磷酸锰铁锂正极材料的研发、生产与销售，其产品目前已覆盖新能源汽车、两轮电动车及储能系统等多个应用场景。 作为近年来备受关注的一条技术路线，磷酸

item.title: Asia stocks wipe out 2026 gains as Iran war drives inflation worries
item.description: [Straits Times] Asian economies including South Korea, Japan and India are especially vulnerable to oil shocks.

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] As AI leaders scramble for viable business models, the moves from OpenAI and Meta look less strategic and more like panic under pressure. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Data built modern marketing, but AI is rewriting the rules
item.description: [MarTech] Marketers have long treated data as the goal. AI flips that model. Here’s how to adapt your data strategy. The post Data built modern marketing, but AI is rewriting the rules appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: How NotebookLM turns marketing docs into usable insights
item.description: [MarTech] Upload research, reports and campaign data to explore patterns, answer questions and uncover insights from your own material. The post How NotebookLM turns marketing docs into usable insights appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Why Chinese tech companies are racing to set up in Hong Kong
item.description: [BBC Technology] Mainland firms are using the territory to test products and as a springboard for global expansion.

item.title: Tech CEOs suddenly love blaming AI for mass job cuts. Why?
item.description: [BBC Technology] More tech leaders are pointing to job cuts caused by AI tools - and a need for more investment cash.

item.title: Singapore’s deep-tech push requires ‘calculated bets’, stronger ecosystem: NUS Enterprise’s Benjamin Tee
item.description: [Business Times] Such ventures are not about moving from ‘zero to one’, but about scaling breakthroughs to impact millions, he says

item.title: Okta’s CEO is betting big on AI agent identity
item.description: [The Verge AI] Today, I’m talking with Todd McKinnon, who is co-founder and CEO of Okta, a platform that lets big companies manage security and identity across all the apps and services their employees use. Think of it like login management — actually, that’s a great way to think about it because the way most peop

item.title: The truth about martech in 2026
item.description: [MarTech] AI is exposing what your martech stack can’t hide. In 2026, teams without the skills and processes to support it won’t be able to prove ROI. The post The truth about martech in 2026 appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: The hidden tradeoffs in moving to a composable martech stack
item.description: [MarTech] Best-of-breed stacks promise agility, but the real impact on speed and cost depends on how well teams manage integration, data and operational complexity. The post The hidden tradeoffs in moving to a composable martech stack appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: The IRS Wants Smarter Audits. Palantir Could Help Decide Who Gets Flagged
item.description: [WIRED AI] Documents show the tax agency is testing a Palantir tool to surface “highest-value” audit and investigation targets from a maze of legacy systems.

item.title: AI Research Is Getting Harder to Separate From Geopolitics
item.description: [WIRED AI] A policy change announced by NeurIPS, the world’s leading AI research conference, drew widespread backlash from Chinese researchers this week and then was quickly reversed.

item.title: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
item.description: [BBC Technology] The changes will see the recommended retail price of the PS5 rise from £479.99 to £569.99 in the UK.

item.title: Apple Still Plans to Sell iPhones When It Turns 100
item.description: [WIRED AI] As the tech giant turns 50, WIRED spoke to executives about how they plan to win in the AI era.

item.title: Lloyds bank reveals IT glitch affected almost half a million customers
item.description: [BBC Technology] In a letter to the Treasury Select Committee, Lloyds apologised and said some compensation had been paid.

item.title: The Latest AI Documentary Asks: Just How Scared Should We Be?
item.description: [WIRED AI] The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist seeks the middle ground on a polarizing technology—and ends up letting tech execs like Sam Altman off the hook.

item.title: I Asked ChatGPT 500 Questions. Here Are the Ads I Saw Most Often
item.description: [WIRED AI] Ads are rolling out across the US on ChatGPT’s free tier. I asked OpenAI's bot 500 questions to see what these ads were like and how they related to my prompts.

item.title: This time it’s different: LaunchPad @ one-north’s next act signals a maturing startup ecosystem
item.description: [Business Times] The next iteration of it may be more structured and more technologically advanced

item.title: Why the Mac Mini is out of stock: A look at Singapore’s OpenClaw buzz
item.description: [Business Times] A new AI agent has taken the world by storm. Is this a new hype cycle or the start of a tech...

item.title: Judge rejects Pentagon's attempt to 'cripple' Anthropic
item.description: [BBC Technology] A federal judge told the government it could not immediately enforce a ban on Anthropic’s tools.
